buckets.label: Template contamination
buckets.description: Imports familiar Goldilocks facts or aliases that are not in the local source story.

buckets.label: Chronology loss
buckets.description: Extracts roughly correct events but loses their source order or before/after relations.

buckets.label: Speech/truth confusion
buckets.description: Treats direct speech or a character claim as narrator-confirmed world truth.

buckets.label: Subjective/objective confusion
buckets.description: Treats a character judgment such as just right as an objective safety or correctness fact.
watch_for: accepted choice treated as true fitness

buckets.label: Causal gap
buckets.description: Captures an event but misses its consequence, state change, or downstream repair need.

buckets.label: Final-state staleness
buckets.description: Leaves an earlier temporary state active after a later remedy, repair, or resolution.

buckets.label: Group expansion failure
buckets.description: Fails to preserve countable grouped entities that need individual symbolic support.
watch_for: six brass wheels collapsed to one vague wheel

buckets.label: Ownership-transfer error
buckets.description: Mistakes use, possession, swallowing, or temporary control for ownership.

buckets.label: Whimsy erasure
buckets.description: Normalizes magical or comic literal details into metaphor, mood, or disposable style.

buckets.label: Predicate fragmentation
buckets.description: Invents many near-duplicate predicates instead of using the controlled fixture vocabulary.
watch_for: ate/2 vs eat_all/5 vs consumed/2 drift
ownership split across ad hoc predicates
